GET /twitter/trends.desc_en: Return the list of trending topics for a given location, identified by its WOEID.
GET /twitter/trends.description_zh: 返回指定地点（以 WOEID 标识）的热门趋势列表。

GET /twitter/spaces/detail.heading_zh: 获取 Space 详情 GET /twitter/spaces/detail
GET /twitter/spaces/detail.desc_en: Return the full details of a single Twitter Space, including its settings, audience stats, and creator profile.
GET /twitter/spaces/detail.description_zh: 返回单个 Twitter Space 的完整详情，包括设置、听众统计与创建者资料。

woeid.desc_en: The WOEID (Where On Earth ID) identifying the location whose trends you want.
woeid.title_zh: 标识目标地点的 WOEID（Where On Earth ID），用于取该地的趋势。

trends.desc_en: The list of trending topics for the requested location.
trends.title_zh: 所请求地点的热门趋势列表。

trends.target.desc_en: The search target this trend resolves to.
trends.target.title_zh: 该趋势对应的搜索目标。

trends.target.query.desc_en: The search query string that opens this trend's results.
trends.target.query.title_zh: 打开该趋势结果所用的搜索查询字符串。

trends.rank.desc_en: Position of the trend in the list, where a smaller number ranks higher.
trends.rank.title_zh: 趋势在榜单中的名次，数字越小排名越靠前。

trends.meta_description.desc_en: Supplementary descriptive text for the trend, such as associated post volume or context.
trends.meta_description.title_zh: 趋势的补充描述文本，如相关讨论量或背景信息。

status.desc_en: Whether the request succeeded or errored.

msg.desc_en: Accompanying message, typically the error detail when the request did not succeed.
msg.title_zh: 附带消息，通常是请求未成功时的错误详情。

space_id.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter Space to look up.
space_id.title_zh: 要查询的 Twitter Space 标识。

data.state.desc_en: Current lifecycle state of the Space, such as whether it is scheduled, live, or ended.
data.state.title_zh: Space 当前的生命周期状态，如已排期、直播中或已结束。

data.scheduled_start.desc_en: When the Space is scheduled to start.

data.updated_at.desc_en: When the Space's record was last updated.
data.updated_at.title_zh: Space 记录最近一次更新的时间。

data.media_key.desc_en: Media key referencing the Space's audio stream.
data.media_key.title_zh: 指向该 Space 音频流的媒体键。

data.is_subscribed.desc_en: Whether the requesting user is subscribed to the Space.
data.is_subscribed.title_zh: 发起请求的用户是否已订阅该 Space。

data.settings.conversation_controls.desc_en: Coded value indicating who is permitted to participate in the conversation.
data.settings.conversation_controls.title_zh: 表示谁可参与对话的编码值。
data.settings.conversation_controls.annotation: 源码未声明该整数各取值的含义，待研发确认。

data.settings.disallow_join.desc_en: Whether new participants are blocked from joining the Space.
data.settings.disallow_join.title_zh: 是否禁止新参与者加入该 Space。

data.settings.is_employee_only.desc_en: Whether the Space is restricted to employees only.
data.settings.is_employee_only.title_zh: 该 Space 是否仅限员工。

data.settings.is_locked.title_zh: 该 Space 是否已锁定。

data.settings.is_muted.desc_en: Whether the Space is muted for the requesting user.
data.settings.is_muted.title_zh: 该 Space 对发起请求的用户是否已静音。

data.settings.is_space_available_for_cli.desc_en: Whether clips may be created from the Space.
data.settings.is_space_available_for_cli.title_zh: 是否允许从该 Space 制作剪辑。

data.settings.is_space_available_for_rep.desc_en: Whether a replay of the Space is available.
data.settings.is_space_available_for_rep.title_zh: 该 Space 是否提供回放。

data.settings.no_incognito.title_zh: 是否禁止匿名（隐身）收听。

data.settings.narrow_cast_space_type.desc_en: Coded value indicating the Space's narrowcast type.
data.settings.narrow_cast_space_type.title_zh: 表示该 Space 定向广播类型的编码值。
data.settings.narrow_cast_space_type.annotation: 源码未声明该整数各取值的含义，待研发确认。

data.settings.max_guest_sessions.desc_en: Maximum number of concurrent guest speaker sessions allowed.
data.settings.max_guest_sessions.title_zh: 允许的并发嘉宾发言会话数上限。

data.settings.max_admin_capacity.desc_en: Maximum number of admins the Space can have.
data.settings.max_admin_capacity.title_zh: 该 Space 可拥有的管理员数量上限。

data.stats.total_participants.desc_en: Total number of participants across the Space.
data.stats.total_participants.title_zh: 该 Space 的参与者总人数。

data.creator.desc_en: Profile of the user who created the Space.
data.creator.title_zh: 创建该 Space 的用户资料。

data.creator.location.desc_en: Location listed on the creator's profile.
data.creator.location.title_zh: 创建者资料中填写的所在地。

data.creator.url.desc_en: Website URL listed on the creator's profile.
data.creator.url.title_zh: 创建者资料中填写的网站链接。

data.creator.description.desc_en: Bio text on the creator's profile.
data.creator.description.title_zh: 创建者资料中的简介文本。

data.creator.protected.desc_en: Whether the creator's account is protected (private).
data.creator.protected.title_zh: 创建者账号是否受保护（私密）。

data.creator.isVerified.desc_en: Whether the creator's account is verified.
data.creator.isVerified.title_zh: 创建者账号是否已认证。

data.creator.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the creator holds a Twitter Blue verification.
data.creator.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 创建者是否拥有 Twitter Blue 认证。

data.creator.verifiedType.desc_en: The kind of verification the creator's account holds.
data.creator.verifiedType.title_zh: 创建者账号所持认证的类型。

data.creator.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the creator.
data.creator.followers.title_zh: 关注该创建者的账号数。

data.creator.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the creator follows.
data.creator.following.title_zh: 该创建者关注的账号数。

data.creator.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the creator has liked.
data.creator.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该创建者点赞过的推文数。

data.creator.statusesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the creator has posted.
data.creator.statusesCount.title_zh: 该创建者发布的推文数。

data.creator.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the creator has posted.
data.creator.mediaCount.title_zh: 该创建者发布的媒体条目数。

data.creator.createdAt.desc_en: When the creator's account was created.
data.creator.createdAt.title_zh: 创建者账号的注册时间。

data.creator.coverPicture.desc_en: URL of the creator's profile cover image.
data.creator.coverPicture.title_zh: 创建者资料封面图的链接。

data.creator.profilePicture.desc_en: URL of the creator's profile avatar.

data.creator.canDm.desc_en: Whether the requesting user can send the creator a direct message.
data.creator.canDm.title_zh: 发起请求的用户是否可以向该创建者发送私信。

data.creator.affiliatesHighlightedLabel.desc_en: Highlighted affiliation label shown on the creator's profile.
data.creator.affiliatesHighlightedLabel.title_zh: 创建者资料上展示的关联机构高亮标签。

data.creator.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the creator's account is marked as automated (a bot).
data.creator.isAutomated.title_zh: 创建者账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

data.creator.automatedBy.desc_en: Identifier of the account that manages this automated account.
data.creator.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的账号标识。

status.desc_en: Whether the request succeeded or errored.

msg.desc_en: Accompanying message, typically the error detail when the request did not succeed.
msg.title_zh: 附带消息，通常是请求未成功时的错误详情。
